mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_ods_valuation_filedata ( id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, row_data_number, row_data_json, row_univer_json, header_meta_json ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{taskId}, #{fileId}, #{sheetName}, #{rowDataNumber}, #{rowDataJson}, #{rowUniverJson}, #{headerMetaJson} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, row_data_number, row_data_json, row_univer_json, header_meta_json FROM t_ods_valuation_filedata WHERE task_id = #{taskId} ORDER BY sheet_name ASC, row_data_number ASC

SELECT id, task_id, file_id, sheet_name, row_data_number, row_data_json, row_univer_json, header_meta_json FROM t_ods_valuation_filedata WHERE file_id = #{fileId} ORDER BY sheet_name ASC, row_data_number ASC
